top_signals.title: Industrial Metals Decline as Traders Weigh Fed Rate Outlook
top_signals.summary: Base metals retreated on Friday as traders weighed the likelihood of higher interest rates and their negative impact on demand.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: US escalates attacks on Iran as it expands range of targets
top_signals.summary: American forces hit deeper inside the country as Islamic republic reports strikes on its infrastructure
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank Eye FX Deposits For Margin Boost
top_signals.summary: The Reserve Bank of India’s latest measures to attract foreign currency inflows are set to lift optimism when some of the country’s largest private sector banks report on Saturday.

top_signals.title: Dejected England and France prepare for World Cup match neither wanted
top_signals.summary: France's hopes ‌of ‌reaching a third successive World Cup final were emphatically ended by Spain, while England suffered its own heartbreak a day later with a loss to Argentina.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
